title: rubus × cardiophylloides
intro: Rubus × cardiophylloides, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus procerus). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × cardiophylloides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
